name: fleet-refresh-0-21-6
title: Roll out SD pack 0.23.8 to the consumer fleet
description: Refresh all configured consumers from their current installed version to release 0.23.8 through the canonical fleet preflight, sequential PR, review, merge, provenance, and audit process.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Retargeted from 0.21.6 through corrective releases 0.23.1-0.23.7 as consumer reviews surfaced work-loop and status-boundary defects, then to 0.23.8 after loadsmith PR #100 found that blank persisted branch evidence could survive a head-only update; the task slug is retained for continuity.
